channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: An In-Depth Overview of Harbeth Speakers and Their Technological Evolution
item.description: The article explores the history, technological development, and current product lineup of British audio manufacturer Harbeth, a brand deeply influenced by decades of BBC research into studio monitor ...

item.title: Chinese Humanoid Robots Demonstrate Advanced Balance and Coordination in Lunar New Year Performance
item.description: During China’s Lunar New Year gala, one of the most widely viewed television events in the world, a group of humanoid robots built by Chinese robotics company Unitree delivered a synchronized kung fu ...

item.title: Russia’s Military Satellite Communications and the Legacy of the Molnya System
item.description: The article argues that claims circulating in Western media about Russian troops being left “blind” or cut off after losing access to Elon Musk’s Starlink satellite network are false and exaggerated. ...

item.title: Charli XCX Denies Knowledge of Alleged Russian Links to Berlin Event and Reaffirms Support for Ukraine
item.description: Charli XCX has publicly addressed criticism she faced after attending a party in Berlin that was alleged online to have connections to Russian political interests. The singer responded directly throug...

item.title: U.S. Information Operations Targeting Iran Amid Political Tensions
item.description: The article discusses the U.S. military and intelligence strategy aimed at influencing public opinion in Iran as part of a broader effort to encourage regime change. This operation, called Operational...

item.title: Top Vacation Destinations for Families of All Ages
item.description: Planning a family vacation involves finding destinations that offer activities and relaxation for everyone, from toddlers to grandparents. Popular theme parks like Universal Studios and Disneyland pro...

item.title: Nick Reyes Details Recent Credit Card Applications and Strategy Changes
item.description: In this article, Nick Reyes from Frequent Miler outlines several credit cards he has recently opened and explains the strategic reasoning behind each decision. Although he previously discussed reducin...

item.title: Judge Blocks Re-Detention of Salvadoran National Kilmar Abrego Garcia After Expired Detention Period
item.description: A federal judge has ruled that Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Salvadoran national, cannot be re-detained by U.S. immigration authorities. Abrego Garcia was mistakenly deported to El Salvador last year, but l...

item.title: UK Government Orders Returning Chagos Islanders to Leave Amid Sovereignty Dispute
item.description: A group of Chagos Islanders who recently returned to the Chagos archipelago to protest the UK Government’s decision to transfer sovereignty of the territory to Mauritius have been ordered to leave by ...

item.title: Federal Judges Find Over 4,400 Illegal ICE Detentions Amid Expanded Deportation Efforts
item.description: A Reuters investigation has found that federal judges across the United States have ruled more than 4,400 times since early October that U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) unlawfully detai...

item.title: Turkey Detains International Delegation Investigating Prison Conditions
item.description: On February 19, 2026, Turkish authorities detained members of an international delegation consisting of lawyers, journalists, and human rights activists who were visiting the country to inspect newly ...

item.title: A Historical Overview of Photographic Manipulation Since the 19th Century
item.description: The article explores the long history of photographic manipulation, arguing that image alteration is not a modern phenomenon but has existed since the birth of photography in the early 19th century. F...

item.title: Apple Acquires Startup Developing Pre-Speech Detection Technology Amid Controversy
item.description: Apple has reportedly acquired Q.ai, a small technology startup specializing in 'pre-speech' detection, for nearly $2 billion. Q.ai, founded by Aviad Maizels, Avi Barliya, and Yonatan Wexler, claims to...

item.title: Archival Video Shows Nasser Mocking Proposal to Mandate Hijab in 1950s Egypt
item.description: The article discusses an archival video from 1958 featuring former Egyptian President Gamal Abdel Nasser addressing a large audience about his interactions with the Muslim Brotherhood during the early...

item.title: Apple acquires Israeli startup developing pre-speech technology
item.description: Apple has acquired Q.ai, an Israeli startup developing 'pre-speech' technology that uses facial micro-movements to anticipate words before they are spoken. The deal, reportedly worth nearly $2 billion...

item.title: Trump Administration Refuses to Share Evidence With Minnesota Officials in Alex Pretti Shooting Investigation
item.description: The Trump administration has denied Minnesota law enforcement officials access to evidence related to the fatal shooting of Minneapolis intensive care nurse Alex Pretti, according to an announcement f...

item.title: Study Finds Gifted Men Show Lower Levels of Conservatism, While Political Views Are Otherwise Similar
item.description: A recent study published in the journal Intelligence examined the long-term political orientations of adults identified as gifted during childhood. Researchers tracked participants from the Marburg Gi...

item.title: Michigan Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Criticized for Remarks Referencing ‘Treason’ and Public Hanging
item.description: A Republican candidate for governor of Michigan, Anthony Hudson, is facing widespread criticism after making public remarks that referenced treason and the punishment of public hanging. Hudson, a Gene...

item.title: Christy Carlson Romano Shares Positive Cancer Screening Results, Awaits PET Scan Amid Family History
item.description: Christy Carlson Romano, the 41-year-old actress known for her roles in Disney Channel's 'Even Stevens' and as the voice of 'Kim Possible,' posted an emotional Instagram video on February 17, 2026, rev...

item.title: Trump Approval Ratings Reach Record Low in Second Term Amid Decline Among Independents
item.description: Recent polling data shows President Donald Trump's approval ratings at historic lows during his second term, with four major polls—AP-NORC, NBC News, Yahoo-YouGov, and Quinnipiac—each reporting record...
